# Helms
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Helms&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom helms and old helms that have been edited from how they appear on the production RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Helm
!Party Buff
!Self Buff
!Range
!Stats
!MP Cost
!Cooldown
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal
Effects
|-
|Galactic Titan Helm
|Berserk:
6.5 sec
|Speedy:
6.5 sec
|4
|<nowiki>+10def</nowiki>
+3vit

+3wis
|105
|7.5 sec
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Helm of the Fallen
|Berserk:
5 sec

+200 hp
|
|6
|<nowiki>+4def</nowiki>
+3spd

+6vit
|90
|6 sec
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Helm of the Demon Lord
|
|Armored:
2.6 sec

Healing:

4 sec
|
|<nowiki>+8vit</nowiki>
+80hp
|115
|5 sec
|4%
|Unique
|
|-
|Shadowscale's Skull
|Berserk:
10 sec
|Speedy:
10 sec
|4
|<nowiki>+5def</nowiki>
+50mp
|150
|6 sec
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Loki's Horns
|Berserk:
8 sec
|Speedy:
4 sec

Invisible:

2.5 sec
|4
|<nowiki>+5spd</nowiki>
|100
|3 sec
|7%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Helm of Oryx
|Berserk:
7.5 sec

Damaging:

4 sec
|
|Berserk:
10

Damaging:

4
|<nowiki>+7att</nowiki>
+10def

+4spd

+4vit

+8dex
|100
|7 sec
|7%
|Legendary
|Physical Barrier
|-
|Helm of the Juggernaut 
|Berserk:
4.5 sec
|Armored:
4.5 sec
|4
|<nowiki>+10def</nowiki>
+5spd
|90
|6 sec
|6%
|Legendary
|Physical Barrier
|}
